MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to plaintiff's counsel, for failure to obtain Judgment or file dismissal against defendant Anthony Chen, is heard this day. There being no appearance or a response to the Order to Show Cause filed, court orderes remaining Defendants Anthony Chen and Does 1 to 10 dismissed. Proceedings reported by: Margaret Del Coto, CSR# 8493 . (212)
